message:
The other day, I realized it had been a while since my family and I reviewed our emergency plans. So, I decided to turn it into a cozy evening! We grabbed some snacks, brewed some hot cocoa, and gathered around the table with our go-bags and important documents. 

As we went through everything, we shared stories and made a game out of what to include in our bags. It turned from a chore into a fun family activity, and we even laughed about the odd items we had stashed away. 

It was a great reminder that being prepared doesn’t have to be stressful. Sometimes, it can be an opportunity to bond and make memories. Have you ever turned a preparedness task into something fun? I'd love to hear your stories!
